expectedAnswers: I'm thinking of having a quiet dinner with my parents.
I might go out with a few close friends—maybe to that new sushi place.
Nothing big, just staying in and watching my favorite movies.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明了生日庆祝计划
语言准确性：是否正确使用了计划表达（like 'I'm thinking of...', 'might go'）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'plans', 'birthday', 'dinner', 'friends'

content.speakerText: How are you planning to celebrate this year?
content.speakerTextCn: 今年你打算怎么庆祝呢？
expectedAnswers: I'm planning a small party with some close friends—nothing too fancy.
I'm not doing anything special this year, but I’d love to go hiking with my sister.
I might treat myself to a nice meal and maybe a little gift—just something low-key.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否完整回应了关于庆祝方式的询问
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的时态（be planning to, might do）和连贯表达
表达自然度：是否体现出自然的口语节奏和适度的修饰（如 'nothing too fancy', 'low-key'）

content.scenarioHint: 你的好友即将过生日，你想自然地询问他/她打算怎么庆祝
content.speakerText: What are you planning for your birthday?
expectedAnswers: I'm thinking of having a quiet dinner with close friends.
Just gonna hang out at home and watch some movies.
Going to a concert with my siblings — hoping to make it special!
Still deciding, but maybe a little picnic in the park?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了对方生日计划
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、地道的表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 birthday, plan, celebrate 等相关词汇

content.scenarioHint: 你和同事关系不错，想在生日前提前了解他/她有没有什么庆祝安排，以便准备惊喜
content.speakerText: Any big plans for your birthday this year?
content.speakerTextCn: 今年生日有什么大计划吗？
expectedAnswers: Nah, just keeping it low-key this time.
Yeah! We're doing a surprise party for me — but shhh, don't tell anyone!
Planning to travel for a weekend getaway with my partner.
Not really, but I’d love to try that new sushi place if anyone’s up for it!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了对对方生日安排的兴趣
语言准确性：是否正确使用了时态和口语缩略形式
表达自然度：是否符合日常英语对话的语气和节奏
关键词覆盖：是否包含 birthday, plan, celebrate, surprise 等相关词汇
